effects_provenance.raw: Zushi THCA Flower 28g / Essential Strain Profile Zushi THCA Flower is a unique hybrid bred from the flavorful combination of Zkittlez and Kush Mints . The cultivar captures attention with vibrant candy sweetness accented by refreshing minty notes, subtle earthiness, and delicate citrus undertones — producing dense, colorful buds with the kind of bag appeal that telegraphs flavor character. Effects Zushi delivers a balanced experience that pairs uplifting cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of refreshing character that distinguishes this Zkittlez-mints cross. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: vibrant candy sweetness up front, with cool minty notes through the middle and a subtle earthy-citrus finish on the exhale. Smoke is smooth and unmistakably refreshing. The terpene profile reads candy-mint-and-citrus — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Zushi harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Zushi THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Zushi THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Explore our full THCA Flower collection for more strains. Candy Earth hybrid Mint THCA Flower Lost In Translation

effects_provenance.raw: Biscotti Trop THCa Flower (Triploid) 1g - Type 1 THCa Shop for Biscotti Trop THCa Flower (Triploid) Biscotti Trop THCa Flower is a premium triploid strain with a deep, sweet aroma and a velvety terp profile that blends spice, citrus, and floral notes. Its buds are dense, frosty, and built for those who want bold flavor and smooth effects in every hit. Ideal for both creative sessions and laid-back evenings, Biscotti Trop delivers a euphoric mental lift with a soothing body calm. As a triploid strain, it stands out in both potency and finish. What Are THCa Triploid Flowers? THCa triploid flowers are bred with 3 sets of chromosomes instead of the usual 2. This unique genetic makeup makes them naturally seedless , allowing the plant to channel more energy into producing dense, potent, and terpene-rich buds. The result? A smoother smoke, bold flavors, and elevated THCa levels. At Hemp Hop, we bring you the best in next-gen genetics, always curated with care. We would love for you to try these and experience the difference for yourself. Biscotti Trop THCa Flower Highlights Type : THCa Flower (Triploid) Dominant Terpenes : Caryophyllene, Limonene, Humulene, Linalool Flavors : Sweet spice, earthy citrus, floral Aroma : Peppery, herbal, citrus, musky THCa : 25.69% Effects : Euphoric, relaxing, mentally clear Biscotti Trop Effects Biscotti Trop brings on a clear-headed euphoria that uplifts without clouding focus. Great for daytime or early evening use, it keeps the mind light while easing the body into a relaxed, feel-good state. Uplifted mood Calm without sedation Creative and mentally relaxed Biscotti Trop Cannabinoids THCa : 25.69% Δ9-THC : 0.24% Total Cannabinoids : 26.63% Biscotti Trop Terpenes Caryophyllene : Peppery, warm, calming Limonene : Citrusy, bright, mood-lifting Humulene : Herbal, woody, grounding Linalool : Floral, soothing, slightly sedative Why Choose Hemp Hop for Biscotti Trop THCa Flower Premium indoor or greenhouse-grown flower Rich terpene profiles with high THCa content Fully Farm Bill compliant and third-party lab tested Sourced from trusted small-batch cultivators Perfectly cured and hand-trimmed for top-tier quality Trusted by over 100,000 customers nationwide. Already vibin’??? 👉Might as well explore the full High THCa Flower collection. OR... 👉Check out our CBD Hemp flower collection for a SMOOTHER vibe. effects_provenance.raw: Swizzlers CBD Flower 1g Shop for Swizzlers CBD Flower Swizzlers CBD Flower is a candy-sweet cultivar designed for smooth sessions without the high. With a flavor profile inspired by its name and a parentage that includes Strawberry Chemdawg, Sour Space Candy, and Blueberry Muffin, this flower brings fruity, dessert-like terps with deeply calming effects. If you're looking for a delicious way to ease tension, boost mood, or stay centered throughout the day, Swizzlers is a solid go-to. This CBD-rich strain is crafted for clear-headed calm with zero intoxication. Swizzlers CBD Flower Highlights Type : CBD-Dominant Hemp Flower Parent Strains : Strawberry Chemdawg × Sour Space Candy × Blueberry Muffin Flavors : Sweet berry, strawberry candy, creamy blueberry, herbal spice Aroma : Fruity and sugary with hints of diesel, muffins, and sour citrus Effects : Relaxing, uplifting, balanced, clear-headed CBD : 15.84% What is Swizzlers CBD Flower? Swizzlers is a hybrid CBD strain known for its playful candy-like profile and balanced experience. The dominant influence from Strawberry Chemdawg gives it bold berry notes and a touch of diesel, while Blueberry Muffin softens the flavor with sweet, creamy undertones. Sour Space Candy adds a slight citrusy funk and grounding herbal edge. The result is a smooth-smoking flower that's tasty, fragrant, and chill, perfect for any time of day. effects_provenance.raw: Mochi THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Mochi THCA Flower is a luxurious hybrid built on the cross of Sunset Sherbet and Thin Mint Girl Scout Cookies . The cultivar produces dense, frost-coated buds with the kind of richly dessert-leaning aromatic profile that combines sweet creamy vanilla, ripe berries, and a subtle touch of mint and spice — structurally premium with serious bag appeal. Effects Mochi delivers a balanced, calming experience that pairs uplifting cerebral euphoria with comfortable body relaxation. The high feels well-rounded and pleasant — suitable for late-afternoon use, social settings, or evening flavor-led decompression — with the kind of dessert-rich character that distinguishes Cookies-line genetics. Flavor & Aroma On the palate: smooth fruity gelato up front, with creamy vanilla through the middle and a hint of mint on the exhale. Smoke is silky and unmistakably bakery-leaning. The terpene profile reads vanilla-berry-and-mint — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Mochi harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Mochi THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. effects_provenance.raw: Carbon Fiber THCA Flower Essential / 28g Strain Profile Carbon Fiber THCA Flower is a three-way hybrid bred from Grape Pie , Biscotti , and Cookies and Cream . The result is a structurally premium bud: dense, dark, glassy with trichomes, and visually closer to a top-shelf cookie cut than a typical fruit hybrid. A potent profile geared toward experienced users who want depth without blowing past their tolerance. Effects Carbon Fiber lands on the heavier end of hybrid. The onset is fast and noticeably cerebral — thoughtful, slightly introspective — before settling into a deeply relaxed body baseline. Best paired with downtime, a meal, or a quiet evening rather than tasks that require sharp focus. A classic experienced-smoker hybrid. Flavor & Aroma Layered and complex on the palate: earthy and slightly peppery up front, with sweet ripe berries from the Grape Pie parent and a baked, creamy Biscotti backbone on the exhale. Smoke carries a subtle chemical edge that pulls everything together. The terpene profile reads dessert-meets-gas — see the COA for the exact terpene breakdown of the current batch. Lab Tested — View the COA Every Carbon Fiber harvest is third-party tested for cannabinoid content, terpenes, residual solvents, pesticides, and heavy metals. Download the Carbon Fiber THCA Flower Certificate of Analysis (PDF) for full test results. Tiers Explained Our three quality tiers are: Supreme — Hand-selected top-shelf buds with the densest structure, highest trichome coverage, and strongest terpene expression. Preferred — Premium-grade flower at a balanced price, using the same genetics and cultivation with a slightly broader bud selection. Essential — Our value tier, using the same strain and lab testing with smaller or more uniform buds. Federally Compliant Hemp Lit Farms Carbon Fiber THCA Flower is hemp-derived and federally compliant under the 2018 Farm Bill — containing less than 0.3% Δ9-THC by dry weight at harvest. Must be 21+ to purchase. Not for sale in jurisdictions where THCA flower is restricted. Perfect for end-of-day sessions, Mochi Punch brings the kind of soothing body high that melts stress and lifts the mind without heavy sedation. It opens with a smooth inhale filled with sweet fruit and creamy berry notes, followed by a subtle herbal spice on the exhale. The high kicks off with a strong mental shift, clearing negative thoughts and replacing them with creative energy and calm. Soon after, the body begins to relax into a heavy stillness, perfect for winding down and letting go. effects_provenance.raw: Black Cherry Gelato THCa Flower 1g - Type 1 THCa What is Black Cherry Gelato THCa Flower Strain? Black Cherry Gelato THCa Flower Strain is a slightly indica-dominant hybrid strain (60% indica/40% sativa), crafted through the expert crossing of Black Cherry Funk and Acai strains. This strain stands out for its superb flavor profile and deeply relaxing effects, making it a favorite among indica enthusiasts who also cherish a great taste. Black Cherry Gelato is distinguished by its sweet, fruity cherry berry flavor, enriched with a subtle skunky herbal touch, providing a delightful sensory experience. The buds are known for their dense structure and a striking appearance with a sweet aroma that intensifies upon combustion. Black Cherry Gelato Terpenes The terpene profile of Black Cherry Gelato is rich and effective, led by limonene, caryophyllene, and humulene. Limonene offers a refreshing citrus note that brightens the sweet and fruity flavors, contributing to the strain's mood-elevating properties. Caryophyllene adds a spicy and woody undertone, enhancing the complexity of the flavor and providing stress-relieving benefits. Humulene contributes an earthy, hoppy aroma, which complements the other terpenes and adds to the overall calming effects. This synergistic combination of terpenes not only makes Black Cherry Gelato a joy to consume but also enhances its therapeutic potential. Black Cherry Gelato Strain Cannabinoids THCA: 31.89% Total Cannabinoids: 33.51% D9-THC: 0.18% Black Cherry Gelato THCA Strain Effects Black Cherry Gelato is known for inducing a profoundly relaxing experience, starting with a mild elevation in mood that gradually transitions into a deep sense of calm. The initial uplifting effect gently soothes the mind, paving the way for a serene relaxation that envelops the body. This makes Black Cherry Gelato perfect for unwinding in the evening or enjoying a laid-back weekend. The strain’s ability to ease into relaxation without overwhelming sedation makes it suitable for those looking to de-stress and enjoy a peaceful time, enhancing leisure activities or simply chilling at home. Genotype: Black Cherry Gelato (Black Cherry Funk x Acai) Phenotype: Black Cherry Gelato Hemp Flower contains less than .3% Delta 9 THC For Adult Use Only Already vibin’??? 👉Might as well explore the full THCa Hemp flower collection. OR... 👉Check out our CBD Hemp flower collection for a SMOOTHER vibe. Caryophyllene Da

effects_provenance.raw: Illuminati THCa Weight: 14g Illuminati THCa is an amazing strain that tests at +29% THCa and delivers classic indica power with a composed balanced potency in a gorgeous pacakge. The first waves bring a clear, pine-tinged head change that steadies the mood and clears mental clutter. As the session unfolds, a soothing heaviness spreads through the body while the head stays grounded and reflective. It’s the perfect strain for evening decompression, deep conversations, or turning down the volume after a long day. 29.39% total THCa 30.93% total cannabinoids Indica Dom. The break shows resinous interiors and a well-set cure that grinds fluffy and sticky.[/vc_column_text][/vc_tta_section][vc_tta_section title=”Aroma” tab_id=”aroma”][vc_column_text css=”” text_larger=”yes” woodmart_inline=”no”]Illuminati THCa has a flavor of pine and earthy kush with a clean lemon-fuel edge. thca flower – delta diamonds net weight 14 grams note product not available in all states see the complete list below our product section here . delta diamonds (new 7 15 26) hybrid – 26.2% thca citrus spice funk creeper sensational euphoric sensational relief coa legal information while technically thca isn’t delta 9 thc it should be noted that it’s likely to show on a thc focused drug screening. this is due to the nature of thca as a cannabinoid. being a pre cursor to delta 9 thc the combustion causes thca to decarboxylate – which in turn triggers it to change to delta 9 thc. those who are expecting a drug screening should refrain from smoking thca flowers as a precautionary measure. legal opinion letter click here for shipping information. best selling products indoor thca flower new & popular newest products products thca thca flower hybrid indoor thca net weight 661 10 grams (smalls) 10 grams smalls 565 14 grams 14 grams 566 28 grams 28 grams 563 3.5 grams 3 5 grams 564 7 grams 7 grams
